name: Self-Hosted JVM Heap Exhaustion on AWS EC2
description: Prometheus alert showing heap memory limits exceeded on a self-hosted Spring Boot app.
expected_diagnosis: JVM Heap memory has reached max allocation limits, causing GC pauses and high latency on EC2 instance.

alert_payload.details: Prometheus Alert: JVM Heap Memory Usage > 98% for billing-service running on EC2 instance i-0abcdef1234567890.
